Product Manager
➕ Add New Product
Dashboard › Add Product
✏️ You are editing an existing product. Changes will update the live listing.
📝 Basic Information Name, category & descriptions
Please enter a product name.
Please select a category.
Please enter a short description.
💡 This appears on product cards. Keep it engaging and informative.
📖 Shown on the full product page. More detail = more trust.
💰 Pricing & Availability Price, units & stock
Please enter a valid price.
💸 Must be less than regular price.
Please select a unit.
Please enter minimum order quantity.
Please enter stock quantity.
🌍 Origin & Certifications Source country & quality marks
Please select origin country.
🏷️ Product Tags Helps with search & discovery
💡 E.g. organic, superfood, anti-inflammatory, gluten-free
📸 Product Image
🖼️

Image preview will appear here

🌐 Use Unsplash: ?w=400&q=80
🚀 Publish
Your product will be immediately visible to customers once published. Ensure all required fields are complete.
✅ Products are immediately live after publishing
↩ Cancel & Go Back
💡 Pro Tips
  • 📸 Use high-quality product images — listings with images sell 3× more
  • 📝 Detailed descriptions build customer trust and reduce returns
  • 🏷️ Add 5–10 relevant tags to boost search visibility
  • 🌍 Always include all applicable certifications — customers filter by them
